//: Lockdown sub-flag: block all Claude Code update paths.
//1: DISABLE_UPDATES=1 (added in Claude Code 2.1.118) blocks autoupdates AND the manual `claude update` command, even when the user passes --force.
//2: Stricter than DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER which only blocks autoupdates.
//3: Use in locked-down / air-gapped / enterprise environments where updates must flow through a controlled channel.
